title: One block horror
description: It's regular one block survival, but with many dwellers to give you a chilling experience (optimized)
body:
Need a server? Click [HERE](https://bisecthosting.com/kamussy) to get one 25% off!

---

**Search tags:** horror, scary, dweller, dwellers, entity, entities, one block, oneblock, modpack, 

---

If you need help, need to report a bug, have suggestions, or need people to play with, please join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/fYrff3FXG3)

---

It's as simple as the summary, it is one block, but with dwellers and psychological horror mods.

---

This mod includes these dwellers and other horror mods:

 - CANTBREATHE

 - Cave dweller

 - From the fog

 - Apollyon

 - Goatman

 - The irritator

 - The man from the shadow

 - The mimic dweller

 - The famished

 - The knocker

 - The man from the fog

 - The nether stalker dweller

 - Whispering spirits

 - And more!

---

This modpack isn't just a bunch of dweller mods thrown together in 5 minutes, I have made many horror modpacks, and each of them are ensured to be made to the best of my ability. This modpack is not fully tested, and as time goes on, dwellers and mods will be removed and added to make sure this modpack is as good as it can possibly be.

---

I do NOT own any of the mods in this modpack. I only combined them into one modpack for people to play. I do NOT claim to have rights to any of these modpacks. 

---

All credit goes to the rightful owners of these mods.

The profile image was taken from Tom's YouTube video.

[Voice chat curseforge page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/simple-voice-chat)
